prompt: Generate chapter 2 (S-line, simulation world) with world texture through narration

assertions.name: no-meta-narrative
assertions.check: Does not contain 主角, 第一章, 讀者, protagonist, chapter one, reader

assertions.name: opens-with-action-or-dialogue
assertions.check: First 3 non-empty lines contain dialogue or action, not pure scenic description

assertions.name: key-dialogue-fang
assertions.check: Contains 答案在提問前已寫好 or close variant

assertions.name: wall-temp-whispered
assertions.check: 23°C or 二十三度 appears no more than 3 times (whispered, not shouted)
